_comment: Sample facilitator profiles for Otterotter. Edit freely. 'modalities' is a list of practice tags.

facilitators.name: Sample Facilitator One
facilitators.bio_short: Contact improvisation teacher with a background in contemporary dance. Teaches weekend workshops across the Nordics.

facilitators.name: Sample Facilitator Two
facilitators.bio_short: Eco-somatic practitioner working with Authentic Movement and nature-based embodiment retreats.

facilitators.name: Sample Facilitator Three
facilitators.bio_short: Touring CI facilitator with European rotations; focuses on the Underscore and improvisational scores.
